CREATE TABLE test_table (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, section_name VARCHAR(255), item_count INTEGER);
INSERT INTO test_table (section_name, item_count) VALUES ('Parameters', cfg_item_count(virtuoso_ini_path(), 'Parameters'));
INSERT INTO test_table (section_name, item_count) VALUES ('Settings', cfg_item_count(virtuoso_ini_path(), 'Settings'));
INSERT INTO test_table (section_name, item_count) VALUES ('Misc', cfg_item_count(virtuoso_ini_path(), 'Misc'));
SELECT section_name, item_count FROM test_table ORDER BY item_count DESC;
SELECT MAX(item_count) AS max_items FROM (SELECT cfg_item_count(virtuoso_ini_path(), section_name) AS item_count FROM test_table) AS subquery;
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM test_table WHERE item_count = (SELECT MIN(item_count) FROM test_table);
SELECT section_name FROM test_table WHERE item_count > (SELECT AVG(item_count) FROM test_table) ORDER BY item_count;
DELETE FROM test_table WHERE section_name = 'OldParameters' AND item_count < 10;
SELECT * FROM (SELECT section_name, cfg_item_count(virtuoso_ini_path(), section_name) AS item_count FROM test_table) AS detailed_info WHERE item_count > 5;
SELECT section_name FROM test_table WHERE item_count IN (SELECT item_count FROM test_table WHERE section_name = 'Parameters');
SELECT section_name, item_count FROM test_table WHERE section_name LIKE '%s%' ORDER BY section_name;
UPDATE test_table SET item_count = item_count * 2 WHERE section_name = 'Settings';
SELECT DISTINCT section_name FROM test_table WHERE item_count < (SELECT AVG(item_count) FROM test_table);
